title: festuca ovina var. rubra
intro: Festuca ovina var. rubra, also known as red fescue, is a variety of grass that is native to Europe and Western Asia. It has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of red fescue include reducing inflammation, improving sleep, and providing relief from anxiety and stress. Red fescue can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are commonly used in herbal remedies to promote relaxation and overall well-being.
